solutions.solution: Complete solution to Ex. 1: Following the problem, we understand that the logic of arrangement is following: • Increasing order • left-side only • Increasing order because words are being arranged in alphabetically. • Increasing order, Left-side only because fillings are done only from left. • Interchange because replacements are done by interchanging positions of words. In step 1, excitement comes at first place by interchanging positions with gone. In second step, Friday comes at second place and interchanges places with was.) Now, let us come to the questions:

Complete Solutions to Ex. 1, Ex. 2: There is no special strategy for solving these questions. These problems are written where you have understood the basic reasoning. Then you only have to do some paperwork. You can always use Rule 1, 2 and 3 for reaching quick answers. In case of Rule 4 and 5, you can use them only in case of path problems.
